requirements.title: NestJS application scaffold
requirements.description: Backend NestJS project under backend/ with standard scripts (build, start, test, lint).

requirements.title: Docker Compose PostgreSQL
requirements.description: docker-compose.yml defines a Postgres service suitable for local dev and e2e.
acceptanceCriteria: DB exposes port and credentials align with app defaults or documented overrides

requirements.title: Database connectivity from Nest
requirements.description: Application connects to PostgreSQL via TypeORM using configuration from environment.
acceptanceCriteria: Health (or equivalent) endpoint demonstrates live query against DB when Postgres is up

requirements.title: API schema (OpenAPI)
requirements.description: Expose machine-readable API schema (e.g. Swagger UI + /api-json).
acceptanceCriteria: OpenAPI JSON available at a documented path in running app

requirements.title: Integration / e2e tests
requirements.description: Jest e2e (or similar) runs against app + real DB configuration used in dev.
acceptanceCriteria: `cd backend && pnpm run test:e2e` passes when Postgres is available per README/docker-compose
